# PuFilesUpload

## Intent

- multiple file upload
- file collection
- drag and drop upload
- URL file entry

## Prefer When

- Use for collecting multiple files by picker, drag/drop, or URL.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for a single attachment value; use PuFileUpload.

## Import

```ts
import { PuFilesUpload } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
